question: What quantity of Italian seasoning is specified in the text overlay during the seasoning step? A. 1 teaspoon B. 2 teaspoons C. 1/2 teaspoon
What is the numerical weight value of the ground beef shown in the text overlay?
What color is the long-sleeved shirt worn by the person cooking? A. Black B. White C. Light grey D. Red
What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A stainless steel pot sits inside a black Instant Pot base set to Sauté mode. A hand drops a block of raw ground beef into the pot and uses a wooden spatula to break it up. As the meat browns, seasonings including garlic powder and salt are sprinkled from a small glass bowl. The black lid rests on the wooden surface to the left of the cooker throughout the process.

question: How many text instructions are visible in the overlay?
Which of the previously seen entities is back on screen? A. Raw pink ground meat B. Person in light grey long-sleeved top C. Person in white long-sleeved shirt D. Small glass bowl with yellow powder

Did the chef BOTH press the Sauté button AND add garlic powder? A. Only the Sauté button was pressed B. Only garlic powder was added C. Both the Sauté button was pressed and garlic powder was added D. Neither action occurred

Where is the black pressure cooker lid resting relative to the stainless steel pot while the meat is being browned? A. inside the pot B. above the pot C. to the right of the pot D. to the left of the pot
Where is the stainless steel inner pot positioned relative to the black electric pressure cooker base? A. to the left of the base B. above the base C. inside the base unit D. to the right of the base
What action is the person performing in the video clip? A. setting sauté mode B. pouring sauce C. adding water
Describe the sequence of actions taken to prepare the ground beef in the Instant Pot, including specific timestamps for key steps like setting the mode, adding meat, and seasoning.
canonical_answer: At 2s, a finger presses the Sauté button on the control panel; at 6s, a hand drops a block of raw ground beef into the pot; at 10s, a wooden spatula breaks up the meat inside the stainless steel pot; at 14s, a hand holds a glass bowl of yellow powder over the browned meat; at 18s, piles of unmixed seasonings sit atop the ground beef inside the pot.

question: What specific adjustment is made to the pressure cooker lid in this segment? A. The lid is removed to stir the spaghetti mixture B. The vent knob is turned to the sealing position C. The lid is wiped clean with a white paper towel D. The lid is set aside on the wooden surface

How has the ground beef changed between the start of cooking and the final stirring? A. From browned crumbles to a raw pink block B. From a raw pink block to browned crumbles with spices C. From a liquid sauce to solid chunks of meat D. It remained a raw pink block throughout
What specific seasonings are added to the ground meat?
canonical_answer: Salt, garlic powder, onion powder, and Italian seasoning are added.
